scripts.setup: pnpm --dir frontend install && pnpm --dir cloudflare install
scripts.build:frontend: VITE_API_URL=/ VITE_DISABLE_PWA=true pnpm --dir frontend run build
scripts.check:frontend: pnpm --dir frontend run check:locales && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.check: pnpm run check:worker && pnpm run check:frontend
scripts.deploy:dry-run: pnpm run check && pnpm --dir cloudflare exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.deploy.local.jsonc
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm --dir cloudflare exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.deploy.local.jsonc
scripts.migrate:remote: pnpm --dir cloudflare exec wrangler d1 migrations apply sub-store-cloudflare --remote --config wrangler.deploy.local.jsonc
scripts.migrate:local: pnpm --dir cloudflare exec wrangler d1 migrations apply sub-store-cloudflare --local --config wrangler.deploy.local.jsonc
scripts.seed:local: pnpm run seed:render && pnpm --dir cloudflare exec wrangler d1 execute sub-store-cloudflare --local --config wrangler.deploy.local.jsonc --file ../cloudflare/agent.seed.local.sql
scripts.seed:remote: pnpm run seed:render && pnpm --dir cloudflare exec wrangler d1 execute sub-store-cloudflare --remote --config wrangler.deploy.local.jsonc --file ../cloudflare/agent.seed.local.sql
scripts.check:agent: pnpm run seed:validate -- config/agent-setup.example.json && pnpm run seed:validate -- config/agent-setup.access.example.json && node scripts/render-seed-sql.mjs config/agent-setup.example.json /tmp/sub-store-agent-seed-test.sql && node scripts/render-cloudflare-access.mjs config/agent-setup.example.json /tmp/sub-store-access-disabled-test.json && node scripts/render-cloudflare-access.mjs config/agent-setup.access.example.json /tmp/sub-store-access-enabled-test.json && node scripts/render-wrangler-config.mjs config/agent-setup.example.json /tmp/wrangler.deploy.test.jsonc --database-id 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000
scripts.check:release: pnpm run check && pnpm run check:agent && pnpm run check:module-format && pnpm run check:worker-contract && pnpm run check:open-source && pnpm run check:history -- main
